title: New 30 CRC Storyboards Info
wikitext:
[]: New 3.0 CRC + Storyboards Info             Quote Post by 1731298478 » Thu Nov 24, 2016 5:25 am http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-4900.html A photo of Anno's CRC comment: https://mobile.twitter.com/toshima9min/ ... 6973414400 In the program booklet for the Khara Expo, Anno states that, for content-related reasons among others, he will decide what to do concerning the 3.0 CRC when Shin Eva is released. He does emphasize the importance of the CRCs to him, including the upcoming Shin Godzilla book, and the Yamato and Gundam record collections which inspired them. However, according to MNEF, the booklet also indicates that the 3.0 storyboard book (included in the previous two CRCs) will be published separately in the near future, apparently along with individual versions of the 1.0 and 2.0 storyboard books.

[]: Re: New 3.0 CRC + Storyboards Info             Quote Post by robersora » Thu Nov 24, 2016 9:56 am That's great to hear. Thank you for translating... (now I hope, that when the time arrives someone will translate all this juicy info that'll be in those books...)

[]: Re: New 3.0 CRC + Storyboards Info             Quote Post by 1731298478 » Fri Dec 02, 2016 1:17 am The storyboard books are now available for preorder, with a projected February 2017 release date. http://www.evastore.jp/pc/article/Z0001003.html

[]: Re: New 3.0 CRC + Storyboards Info             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Fri Dec 02, 2016 6:56 am Oooh, nice. I wonder if there will be any deleted material in there? The previous 2.0 storyboard book had the blood splattering the moon sequence and a couple others, iirc.

[]: Re: New 3.0 CRC + Storyboards Info             Quote Post by pwhodges » Fri Dec 02, 2016 7:18 am How do the Storyboards compare with the material in the Groundwork books? IOW, what would be the interest in getting them if the Groundworks are already on your shelf?

[]: Re: New 3.0 CRC + Storyboards Info             Quote Post by robersora » Fri Dec 02, 2016 7:33 am While groundworks are more or less design work sketches, storyboards tell the story of the movie from beginning to end. There's (most likely) four panels on each page, and each panel is a frame from an action in the movie.

[]: Re: New 3.0 CRC + Storyboards Info             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Dec 02, 2016 10:27 am Groundworks books are the pretty much final animation drawings CRC books are the design works and sketches in the main book and storyboards in their own books. Storyboards are the first step in creating the film visually after the script is written. It's where it's all broken down into separately designed shots (or cuts, whichever term you prefer) They're usually very, VERY rough squiggly drawins in one column, dialogue in another and direction notes in a third For khara Eva storyboards specifically: http://i.imgur.com/XZo8Y6a.jpg Left most small column = Cut # Dialogue and sound effects Squiggly drawing Direction/description in case the extremely fast drawing isn't enough Right most small column = Timing in seconds+frames I'm not really expecting much from this storyboard book. It'll likely be sanitized since we're not getting a CRC with it. Previous CRCs and their storyboard books contained the occasional scene that never made it into the final movie.

[]: Re: New 3.0 CRC + Storyboards Info             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Dec 08, 2016 9:16 am Does the Eva Store ship internationally? And how can I order? Thanks in advance. (Love storyboards)

[]: Re: New 3.0 CRC + Storyboards Info             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Thu Dec 08, 2016 10:36 am They don't, but you can buy the storyboards books through Amazon.jp 1.0 2.0 3.0

[]: Re: New 3.0 CRC + Storyboards Info             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Dec 08, 2016 12:03 pm BlueBasilisk wrote: They don't, but you can buy the storyboards books through Amazon.jp 1.0 2.0 3.0

[]: Re: New 3.0 CRC + Storyboards Info             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu Dec 08, 2016 2:01 pm HLJ along with most usual places also have them up for order: http://hlj.com/scripts/hljlist?SeriesID ... Storyboard

[]: Re: New 3.0 CRC + Storyboards Info             Quote Post by Bagheera » Thu Dec 08, 2016 2:06 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: I'm not really expecting much from this storyboard book. It'll likely be sanitized since we're not getting a CRC with it. Previous CRCs and their storyboard books contained the occasional scene that never made it into the final movie.

[]: Re: New 3.0 CRC + Storyboards Info             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu Dec 08, 2016 6:33 pm I don't really see them putting much effort into the 1.0 and 2.0 ones. They seem to be only done out of necessity for completion since having just the 3.0 storyboards as a separate product would seem silly.

[]: Re: New 3.0 CRC + Storyboards Info             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sun Feb 26, 2017 6:47 pm If you check the evageeks twitter, I posted some photos of the storyboards and they retweeted me.

[]: Re: New 3.0 CRC + Storyboards Info             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Jan 17, 2019 11:11 pm Just realized that we now know the CRC won't come before 2020.

[]: Re: New 3.0 CRC + Storyboards Info             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jan 18, 2019 5:41 am Bumping this was a terrible tease and you should feel bad.

[]: Re: New 3.0 CRC + Storyboards Info             Quote Post by Joseki » Fri Jan 18, 2019 6:27 am ^ What she said. I was expecting a release date.

[]: Re: New 3.0 CRC + Storyboards Info             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Fri Jan 18, 2019 9:04 am Reichu wrote: Bumping this was a terrible tease and you should feel bad. :nyao:

[]: Re: New 3.0 CRC + Storyboards Info             Quote Post by robersora » Sun Jan 20, 2019 10:38 am ^ lol. That's like instant gratification. Of course I'm happy for the 10 seconds it takes me to bolt that burger, but the feeling of remorse will stay much longer.

[]: Re: New 3.0 CRC + Storyboards Info             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sun Jan 20, 2019 10:55 pm I'm the dark side of the force.
